overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character walking through a snowy mountain road in a post-apocalyptic setting. The character navigates past abandoned vehicles and approaches a fortified tunnel entrance with sandbag barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered mountain road through evergreen forest

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along snowy road toward abandoned vehicles visible in the distance

entered.detail: snow-packed mountain road with tire tracks and footprints
dense pine trees covering the mountain slopes
rusted metal guardrail along the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide snowy mountain road surrounded by dense evergreen forests. The overcast sky creates diffused lighting across the snow-covered landscape. A metal guardrail runs along the right side of the road, with rocky cliffs visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned vehicle checkpoint on mountain road

events.description: character navigates around abandoned police SUV with open trunk
road curves revealing steep cliff drop-off with valley view on right side

agents.ego_description: navigating through cluster of abandoned vehicles including a police SUV and blue van

notable_agents.action: abandoned police SUV with open trunk partially blocking the road

entered.detail: diamond-shaped yellow warning sign on a metal pole
steep cliff edge with snow-covered rocks descending into valley
snow-covered valley with distant trees visible below the cliff

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a cluster of abandoned vehicles on the snowy road, navigating around a police SUV with its trunk open. The road curves along a steep cliff edge, revealing a dramatic valley view below. The metal guardrail runs closer to the path as the character approaches the cliffside.

scene_state.functional_zone: fortified tunnel entrance with military barriers

events.description: approaching concrete tunnel entrance with sandbag fortifications

agents.ego_description: walking along cliffside guardrail approaching the dark tunnel entrance

entered.detail: large concrete tunnel entrance built into the mountain with dark interior
walls of sandbags stacked along the road forming defensive positions
small wooden guard booth with canvas roof near the tunnel entrance

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the cliffside road toward a fortified tunnel entrance. Sandbag barriers and a military checkpoint booth line the approach to the concrete tunnel built into the mountain. The valley view remains visible to the right as the character nears the dark tunnel opening.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate mountain road that transitions from a dense forest environment to a fortified military checkpoint. It begins with the character walking through a wide, snow-covered landscape under an overcast sky, flanked by evergreen forests and a metal guardrail. As the path progresses, the camera navigates through a cluster of abandoned vehicles, including a police SUV with an open trunk, while the road curves to reveal a dramatic valley view below. The scene then shifts toward the mountain's edge, where the open cliffside gives way to a concrete tunnel entrance. Finally, the camera approaches the dark tunnel opening, passing by sandbag barriers and a military checkpoint booth that line the road.
